page_metadata.biotools__summary: TandemTools package includes TandemQUAST tool for evaluating and improving assemblies of extra-long tandem repeats (ETR) and TandemMapper tool for mapping long error-prone reads to ETRs.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: TandemTools package includes TandemQUAST tool for evaluating and improving assemblies of extra-long tandem repeats (ETR) and TandemMapper tool for mapping long error-prone reads to ETRs.
